title: romulea ramiflora subsp. rollii
intro: Romulea ramiflora subsp. rollii is a plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family, and is a type of bulbous perennial. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Romulea ramiflora subsp. rollii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
